title: Tissue collection and extractions for RNA-seq
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"1olj6","text":"A key aspect of collecting tissue for RNA-seq is that you want to make sure that all samples are collected during the same short period of the day to avoid effects of the circadian cycle. 1/3 to 1/2 of genes greatly change expression during the day. If you don't take this into account, your work may be unpublishable.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5hmns","text":"Get supplies together including a dewer containing liquid nitrogen, a container to pour the liquid nitrogen into, a large plastic spoon with holes in for removal of tubes from liquid nitrogen, and a cooler containing dry ice. Label all tubes beforehand. We have found that the Fisherbrand Premium Microcentrifuge tubes are most durable for collections of tissue into liquid nitrogen. https://www.fishersci.com/shop/products/fisherbrand-premium-microcentrifuge-tubes-2-0ml-9/05408140. Clean area and equipment for collections with ethanol to destroy RNases before beginning collections.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":384,"length":98}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"2158DDCA31E942828A127BDB7E15C308","url":"https://www.fishersci.com/shop/products/fisherbrand-premium-microcentrifuge-tubes-2-0ml-9/05408140"}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"9e7vq","text":"Wear gloves during collections for safety from liquid nitrogen and also to prevent getting RNases from your hands onto the tissue or tubes. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pour liquid nitrogen into a polystyrene cooler or another container that can safely hold liquid nitrogen.
Remove tissue from plant and place in a tube. Make sure to clean scissors or foreceps with ethanol prior to collections.
Immediately plunge tube into liquid nitrogen (transcription profiles change rapidly, so do this as fast as possible).
Transfer tubes into a cooler containing dry ice for transport to a -80C freezer. Store at -80C until ready to extract.

Extract tissue with a Spectrum Plant Total RNA Kit (Sigma-Aldrich). The Lowry lab has achieved consistently high yields of RNA from Mimulus guttatus using this kit. https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/catalog/product/sigma/strn50?lang=en&region=US&gclid=CjwKCAiA__HvBRACEiwAbViuU4EOr5CpJNBCqRf-923Uw8ZrDfSQ6bRXNHIhX4t6lKE7jA5AAHO5UxoCtP0QAvD_BwE
creator: David Lowry
